title: Caveat
body:
![](https://i.imgur.com/a4k1CcL.png) ### [Join the discord to interact with me and others about Minecraft](https://discord.gg/QZUJtsbkcY)
## ![](https://i.imgur.com/kD11hZu.png) OVERVIEW ![](https://i.imgur.com/kD11hZu.png) There are a lot of things that don't make sense in minecraft. So this adds some options for better mob mechanics to the game.
Notes: Requires: - [Data API](https://modrinth.com/project/ZS3lIxKu)
| Included | | :-: | | [![](https://i.imgur.com/09gybor.png "Server Utilities (PMC)")](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/gen-s-player-commands/) [![](https://i.imgur.com/gwtniY6.png "Sheep Painter (PMC)")](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/gen-s-sheep-painter-datapack/) |
## ![](https://i.imgur.com/A8bTUqW.png) FEATURES ![](https://i.imgur.com/A8bTUqW.png) - *Visit the [wiki](https://github.com/GenMode/Minecraft/wiki/Caveat) for more information*
Entities - More info coming Since I need SOME descriptions for this to be verified so while I'm working on the more formalized next update I'll write some down here quickly that I'll probably keep - Rideable Llamas - Shulkers being dyed - Hoglin and Piglin curing - Armor Set buffs? - Multiple loot table changes

## ![](https://i.imgur.com/sdGA9Mw.png) ALSO CHECK OUT ![](https://i.imgur.com/sdGA9Mw.png) | Datapacks | | :-: | | [![](https://i.imgur.com/r2v2UQI.png "Better Babies")](https://modrinth.com/project/W9qgAZfz) [![](https://i.imgur.com/NzWnHuE.png "Reader")](https://modrinth.com/project/F78KXQyP) [![](https://i.imgur.com/e0tO55I.png "Recipes Plus")](https://modrinth.com/project/RWf9UJdD) [![](https://i.imgur.com/o78n1Rj.png "Vesture")](https://modrinth.com/project/L45eoNGD) |
